rationale: C4.1 permutation test for BOS structure detection; conservative tail. Per-family alpha lowered from 0.01 to 0.008 (Deep-Review 2026-04-27) so 5x0.008=0.04 leaves a 0.01 buffer below the 0.05 global cap for unforeseen consumers.
C4.1 permutation test for order-block edge significance. Per-family alpha lowered from 0.01 to 0.008 (Deep-Review 2026-04-27).
C6.1 probabilistic-Sharpe lower bound on per-family TRL. Per-family alpha lowered from 0.01 to 0.008 (Deep-Review 2026-04-27).
C10 per-family Brier-improvement calibration check. Per-family alpha lowered from 0.01 to 0.008 (Deep-Review 2026-04-27).
C5.1 stratified PSR check across regime buckets. Per-family alpha lowered from 0.01 to 0.008 (Deep-Review 2026-04-27).
